name: PaperRoute
tagline: Visibility-paid wallpaper ads with an auditable 50/50 ledger
voice: Paper under a desk lamp, not a lightbox: warm putty LIGHT surfaces (#e6e3db page, never dark mode), warm near-black ink text, soft warm-tinted shadows (rgb(48 40 24 / a)), never cool gray. The register is a ledger: quiet and exact. Money, minutes, and measurements always render in mono with tabular numerals; labels are small tracked uppercase mono tags; label-value pairs join across receipt-style dotted leaders. THE ONE GREEN RULE: ledger green #137437 is the single accent, only on primary actions, live state, and the mark; never decoration, never a hero wash, never a large fill. No second accent, no gradient text, no glassmorphism. Rejects adware/bloatware feel and passive-income hype: no popups, no breathless claims; it earns trust by showing the math. Copy: no em dashes, no hype words, verbs like measure, compose, restore, split.
